refinement_sections.content: I need to understand what slow query performance means and how it affects the customer database. I should look into what indexing is and why it is important for query performance.
The database has over a million records, so I need to find out how many indexes are currently in use and what kind of queries are running slowly.
I should learn about different types of indexing strategies, like single-column indexes or multi-column indexes, to see which one would work best for improving performance.
I need to consider how changing the indexing strategy might affect write operations, like adding or updating records. I should find out if more indexes slow down writes.
I have to think about how the new indexing strategy could affect data integrity, especially if there are concurrent writes happening while queries are running.
I should try to estimate how much faster the queries will be after implementing the new indexing strategy and think about any trade-offs that come with it.
I need to outline what my report will include: an introduction to the problem, analysis of the current indexing, proposed strategy, expected performance improvements, and trade-offs.
